# Power Up With Feastables

Explore the galaxy with a Galaxy Cocoa Crunch Bar, grab a mega boost with the Sour Boost Gummies, or unlock a new level with a White Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup Yoshi Egg. Earn 1000 extra credits with each Super Mario Galaxy Feastables candy you try.
Credits can be earned once per candy type.

Get Tickets - https://www.crownclub.regmovies.

# Your Chance To Win

Get any bubly and any popcorn for your chance to be entered to win a galaxy getaway! Want more entries? Redeem your credits below.

Redeem Credits - https://www.crownclub.regmovies.

https://www.crownclub.regmovies.

# Tuscany Is Calling

When Anna loses her house-sitting job (and housing) in one fell swoop, a chance encounter with Matteo—a handsome Italian who happens to have a villa sitting empty in Tuscany—will inspire her to jet off for Italy, against the advice of her always-honest bestie, Claire.

Buy Tickets - https://www.crownclub.regmovies.

https://www.crownclub.regmovies.

https://www.crownclub.regmovies.

# Get 750 Dragon Krystals!

Get tickets to see Mortal Kombat II, today 4/9 only, and receive a digital code for 750 Dragon Krystals to redeem on Mortal Kombat 1. Codes will be delivered via email on 4/10 to qualifying members.
